notes: Firefox MV2 declares CHZZK and trusted HLS origins as required permissions while runtime policy constrains every redirect by tab, context, method, resource type, playlist shape, and domain.
Playlist families preserve ordered path shape and hash non-volatile query identity with a process-local salt; raw secrets never enter state or diagnostics.

Master variants are syntax-checked, trust-filtered, and backoff-filtered before ranking. Exact master URI evidence is retained, with a narrowly compatible same-family live-shape redirect only when the verified variant and request family are equivalent.
Candidate probes use bounded per-candidate timeout slices so slow high qualities cannot starve lower supported qualities; all requests still fail open at the shared blocking deadline.
Both URL-marker and master evidence have bounded idle lifetimes, rendition failures are suppressed by exact target identity, and global session maps are swept and capped.
Redirect response renewal requires a successful completion and structurally usable HLS text, with the exact previously validated URL as the only empty HTTP 304 exception.
Install, startup, reload, content-message, live-channel, mini-player, foreign-navigation, and tab-close transitions remain token-bound so stale asynchronous work cannot resurrect trust.
Diagnostics clear operations share the background mutation queue, and exported URLs retain only a canonical domain label and media shape.
